message:
test(ssh): expand SFTP error and type test coverage

sftp/error.rs (+17 lines):
- Verify SftpError implements std::error::Error trait with correct
  Display output ("Permission denied") and None source
- Test inequality between all distinct error variant pairs

sftp/types.rs (+104 lines):
- FileType debug format assertions for all four variants
- FilePermissions debug output verification for 0o644 mode
- Metadata symlink/file/dir predicate tests
- Metadata with all-None optional fields
- OpenOptions read-only and write-append construction tests
- RenameOptions custom flag combinations
- FilePermissions owner-exec-only mode (0o100) with full
  permission bit verification and is_readonly() check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
